context_for_next_testing_agent: Honorary Licensee projections regression has been fully fixed and verified. All 21 regression tests in test_projection_regression.py pass. Frontend dashboard displays projections correctly for both direct licensee login and admin simulation view. Rewards API endpoints (summary, leaderboard) are working. Admin simulation modal uses a dropdown to select licensees - the 'Honorary Licensee View' option opens a modal where you select specific licensee or 'Demo Mode'. Note: There's a welcome tour modal that appears on first login - click 'Skip Tour' to dismiss it.
